chain.thought: Explanation: The notes show he cleared 5.65 m twice in 2006 (World Indoor Championships and European Championships), equaling his previous best.

judge_thought: Explanation: The notes column shows the athlete's vault heights. In 2006, he recorded 5.65 m at two competitions (World Indoor Championships and European Championships), which indicates he equaled his previous best height. Thus, the year in which he did something to his previous best (equaled it) is 2006.
